THEINSATIABLE-DESERT_STONE_RELIC.title: Desert Stone
THEINSATIABLE-DESERT_STONE_RELIC.descrip: At the start of each combat, add a [gold]Sand Stone[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] and apply [blue]{QuickSandPower}[/blue] layers of [gold]Quicksand[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEINSATIABLE-DESERT_STONE_RELIC.flavor: A treasure of the Insatiable Sandworm, said to come from a similarly mysterious eternal realm...
THEINSATIABLE-POLISHED_DESERT_STONE_RELI:
At the start of each combat, add a [gold]Sand Stone[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
At the start of your turn, apply [blue]{QuickSandPower}[/blue] layers of [gold]Quicksand[/gold] to ALL enemies.
A carefully polished Desert Stone, the source of the Insatiable Sandworm's power.
THEINSATIABLE-REVERSE_HOURGLASS_RELIC.de: Whenever you apply [gold]Quicksand[/gold] to an enemy, the number of [gold]Quicksand[/gold] layers applied increases by [blue]{QuickSandPower}[/blue].
THEINSATIABLE-REVERSE_HOURGLASS_RELIC.fl: The sand within seems unaffected by gravity, flowing grain by grain from the bottom of the hourglass to the top.
